name: Crib Bedding Set - Whales - 4pc - Cloud Island™
description:
This 4-Piece Crib Bedding Set from Cloud Island™ is suitable for standard cribs and toddler beds. This bedding set includes two crib sheets, with whale prints on a light blue background on one and a white grid pattern against a blue backdrop on the other. Also included are a box-stitched quilt in light blue and a solid blue crib bedskirt with a 14-inch drop length. All pieces are made of 100% cotton and are machine washable for easy cleaning.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
